/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/freeusd_c_stage_composition_arcs.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/freeusd_c_stage_composition_arcs.dir/tests/c_stage_composition_arcs.c.o -o freeusd_c_stage_composition_arcs  src/libfreeusd_c.a src/libfreeusd_base.a src/libfreeusd_usd.a src/libfreeusd_ar.a src/libfreeusd_io.a src/libfreeusd_pcp.a src/libfreeusd_sdf.a src/libfreeusd_vt.a src/libfreeusd_tf.a src/libfreeusd_plug.a
